mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Krabbe disease, atypical, due to saposin A deficiency
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: restless behavior, demyelinating neuropathy (implies dysesthesia and possible other neurological symptoms)
microcytic anemia, bone marrow failure, skeletal anomalies (hemivertebrae, dysplasia implied by shuffling gait)
blue sclerae (not explicitly stated but often associated with osteogenesis imperfecta), scoliosis, fractures (can cause shuffling gait)
joint hypermobility can lead to shuffling gait, vascular issues could explain unexplained bleeding (hematochezia)
growth retardation, coarse facies, corneal opacities (not mentioned here but common features)
progressive neurodegenerative disorder, splenomegaly (could potentially contribute to anemia or blood loss)
